prompt: Turn the supplied repeated correction into the smallest durable target capability, then give a held-out comparable task to a fresh agent without the original discussion or evaluator pointers.
applicability: Applicable when the owner supplies a repeated failure/correction and authorizes a held-out comparable task.
acceptance_tests: The correction becomes a target-owned document, test, script, lint, CI check, skill, or feedback surface.
A held-out fresh agent discovers and uses it without the original discussion.
The held-out task is comparable under the environment lock.
mandatory_failures: The capability exists only in chat.
The evaluator points the held-out agent to it.
The held-out task or environment is not comparable.
evidence_requirements: Repeated-correction evidence and durable capability diff.
Discovery path, environment digest, and target acceptance output.
